mapper.select:
SELECT id, client_name, industry, description, highlight, image_url, image_keyword, products, quantity, sort_order, is_visible, create_time FROM customer_case
AND (client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR industry LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_case (client_name, industry, description, highlight, image_url, image_keyword, products, quantity, sort_order, is_visible, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{clientName}, #{industry}, #{description}, #{highlight}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageKeyword}, #{products}, #{quantity}, #{sortOrder}, #{isVisible}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
